---
title: "Siqi Liu"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/pictures/people/SLiu_s.jpg
  image-alt: "Siqi Liu"
  links:
    - icon: cloud
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/siqi647.bsky.social
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:Siqi.Liu@leibniz-fli.de
---

## Bio

Siqi Liu is a microbiologist focusing on microbial genomics and evolution. Her research explores how microorganisms adapt to environmental change and what drives their evolutionary dynamics, with a current focus on the gut microbiome of *Nothobranchius furzeri* and how microbial communities evolve within a single host lifespan.

## Education

**Chinese Academy of Sciences** | Shanghai, China

Ph.D. in Microbiology | September 2020 – June 2025

**University of Yangzhou** | Yangzhou, China

Bachelor's Degree in Animal Medicine | September 2016 – June 2020

## Experience

**Leibniz Institute on Aging** | Postdoc | September 2025 – Present
